data.title: BlueTerra completes Dover Ditch Living Shoreline project for Village of Tequesta in Palm Beach County, FL to improve water quality and reduce erosion.
data.description: BlueTerra has recently completed the Dover Ditch Living Shoreline project in Palm Beach County, FL, for the Village of Tequesta. This initiative aimed to enhance water quality and minimize erosion and sediment discharge. The successful completion was announced on February 19, 2026, in Winter Garden, Florida.

data.title: Popmenu reports current restaurant spend at $90/week down from $115 in June 2025. 71% of restaurants plan price hikes. Expect more AI in hospitality.
data.description: As of now, consumers are spending approximately $90 per week on dining out, a decrease from $115 in June 2025. 71% of restaurants are planning to increase menu prices this year, a rise from 57% last year. There is a trend towards incorporating more artificial intelligence into restaurant services, indicating a shift towards automated hospitality experiences.

data.title: Ring’s CEO, Jamie Siminoff, faces backlash over privacy concerns from Super Bowl ad for doorbell cameras.
data.description: After the advertisement was broadcasted, Jamie Siminoff has been attempting to address a surge of worries over privacy issues related to his doorbell cameras.

data.title: U.S. stock futures dipped on Thu due to Fed disagreements on interest rates & stalled U.S.-Iran talks, pushing oil prices up. Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.08%, Nasdaq 100 -0.08%, Russell 2000 -0.24%. DoorDash (DASH) up 13.57%, eBay (EBAY) up 7.87%. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Thursday following disagreements among Federal Reserve officials on interest rates, with market participants still expecting two rate cuts this year. Indirect nuclear talks between Iran and the U.S. stalled, pushing oil prices up. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.10%, and the two-year bond was at 3.47%. The CME Group's FedWatch projected a 94% likelihood of no interest rate changes in March. Index performance showed Dow Jones -0.12%, S&P 500 -0.08%, Nasdaq 100 -0.08%, and Russell 2000 -0.24%. Pre-market, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were lower. DoorDash Inc. (DASH) rose 13.57% despite weak Q4 results, with positive forecasts for Q1. eBay Inc. (EBAY) surged 7.87% after better-than-expected Q4 results and a deal with Etsy Inc.

data.title: Blood test predicts Alzheimer's 3-4 years in advance, according to FNIH Biomarkers Consortium study.
data.description: A recent study conducted by the FNIH Biomarkers Consortium in North Bethesda, Maryland revealed a groundbreaking finding. The research indicates that a simple blood test has the potential to forecast the emergence of Alzheimer's symptoms with a high degree of accuracy. Specifically, the test can predict the onset of symptoms within a timeframe of 3 to 4 years, offering significant potential for early detection and intervention strategies in Alzheimer's disease management.

data.title: GekkoVet and Royal Canin expand partnership to Mexico, first in Latin America, providing AI support for vets.
data.description: In a recent announcement, GekkoVet, a prominent Finnish company specializing in AI-driven clinical decision support for veterinarians, has joined forces with Royal Canin, a worldwide trailblazer in pet health via nutrition. The two companies have unveiled their strategic partnership launch in Mexico City. This collaboration represents their inaugural nationwide expansion in Latin America following prosperous implementations in Asia earlier this year. Royal Canin Mexico is providing veterinary teams with GekkoVet’s intelligent assistance.

data.title: Crypto exchange Phemex launches AI-Native Revolution, embedding AI in core operations; driving full-scale transformation.
data.description: In Apia, Samoa on February 19, 2026, a crypto exchange company called Phemex revealed its AI-Native Revolution, marking the beginning of a comprehensive shift within the organization. This transformation incorporates artificial intelligence into its fundamental operating structure, product ideology, and long-term strategies.

data.title: Rockwell Automation deploys CMMS system in Danish agri-giant, aiming for 10% downtime reduction.
data.description: A major agriculture corporation based in Denmark has implemented Fiix® CMMS software in an effort to enhance maintenance efficiency, streamline inventory management, and establish industry-leading protocols. This development was announced in Copenhagen on February 19, 2026. Rockwell Automation, Inc., listed on NYSE as ROK and recognized as the leading entity in industrial automation globally, provided the software solution for this initiative.

data.title: Dating.com enhances user safety with verification, anti-scam measures, moderation, and guidance. Commitment to strengthening protection. NYC, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Dating.com has announced its strategies for bolstering user safety on its digital dating platforms. The company is placing emphasis on user verification, anti-scam measures, human moderation, and providing clear guidance to users. In its efforts to enhance user protection, Dating.com has shared these methods as part of its ongoing commitment. This initiative comes as the company aims to strengthen overall safety for its users. The announcement was made in New York on Feb. 19, 2026, indicating the company's dedication to ensuring a secure dating environment.

data.title: Trump considers trade pact excluding Canada, threatens to alter agreement with significant impact on businesses.
data.description: American authorities are considering significant modifications to a trade deal involving Mexico and Canada, which could potentially disrupt the current business practices and marginalize Canada in the process.
